LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT GIVE NOTICE TO THE OTHER SIDE OF HIS INTENTION TO ARGUE, PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. FAILURE TO NAME TENANTS AS PARTIES TO THIS ACTION. 90 DAY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS APPLIES. SEE LIANG V. S.F. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD 124 C.A. 4TH 775, 778-779; CCP SECTION 1094.6(B). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5759

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JAMES QUINN'S NOTICE Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar. Demurrer to Petition for Writ was sustained without leave to amend on March 9, 2009. (302PHA)Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. Appearances: James Quinn, II, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing, and opposing party. Plaintiff did not give notice to the other side of his intention to argue, pursuant to Local Rule 8.3. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Failure to name tenants as parties to this action. 90 day statute of limitations applies. See Liang v. S.F. Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Board 124 C.A. 4th 775, 778-779; CCP section 1094.6(b). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Continued To Apr-01-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
